title: Journey to Jazz Festival
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Prince Albert is getting...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Prince Albert is getting ready for the much-anticipated Journey to Jazz (J2J) Festival, from 1 to 4 May.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Prince Albert is getting ready for the much-anticipated Journey to Jazz (J2J) Festival, from 1 to 4 May."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This vibrant event, hosted in the heart of the Karoo, is more than just a celebration of jazz - it's a cultural experience that brings together music, art, film, crafts and community in a uniquely intimate setting."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Organisers are inviting the media to arrange interviews with this year's talented artists, as well as the passionate organisers behind the scenes.","html":"Organisers are inviting the media to arrange interviews with this year's talented artists, as well as the passionate organisers behind the scenes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These interviews offer a glimpse into the magic of J2J and the ongoing development of what has become a significant annual festival on the South African cultural calendar.","html":"These interviews offer a glimpse into the magic of J2J and the ongoing development of what has become a significant annual festival on the South African cultural calendar."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Transformation through talent","html":"Transformation through talent"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Journey to Jazz is not only a platform for established and emerging jazz musicians - it also represents transformation in action. What sets this festival apart is its heart: the event is co-produced by the town's youth, who participate in a 9 to 10-month training programme. Through this initiative, young people are equipped with practical skills and valuable industry knowledge to help launch careers in the broader events, music, and hospitality sectors.","html":"Journey to Jazz is not only a platform for established and emerging jazz musicians - it also represents transformation in action. What sets this festival apart is its heart: the event is co-produced by the town's youth, who participate in a 9 to 10-month training programme. Through this initiative, young people are equipped with practical skills and valuable industry knowledge to help launch careers in the broader events, music, and hospitality sectors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This model of inclusive growth and community empowerment lies at the centre of J2J's identity, making it more than just a music festival - it's a movement.","html":"This model of inclusive growth and community empowerment lies at the centre of J2J's identity, making it more than just a music festival - it's a movement."},{"type":"list","items":["Visit https://www.quicket.co.za/events/295039-prince-albert-journey-to-jazz/#/ to buy tickets."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
